design_philosophy.core_concept: No Cap News - Real, Raw, Relevant.
design_philosophy.visual_identity: Gen Z/Alpha Hybrid. Morphing interface that grows up with the user.
key_principles: Tactile over Flat: Cards should feel like physical objects (swiping, stacking).
Vibe Shifts: The UI drastically changes based on age group.
Visual Density: High saturation for kids, high contrast for teens.
Motion First: Nothing appears without a transition.

usage_rules.accents: JetBrains Mono (for tags, dates, 'No Cap' badges)

grid_system.desktop: max-w-md mx-auto min-h-screen border-x border-white/10 shadow-2xl

buttons.kids: rounded-full shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)] active:translate-x-[2px] active:translate-y-[2px] active:shadow-none transition-all
buttons.teens: rounded-lg border border-white/20 hover:bg-white/10 hover:border-primary transition-colors

Card.styling: For teens: Glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/5 border-white/10). For kids: Solid white with heavy drop shadow.

textures.noise: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='noiseFilter'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.65' numOctaves='3' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noiseFilter)' opacity='0.05'/%3E%3C/svg%3E")

instructions_to_main_agent: DYNAMIC THEME: You MUST implement a ThemeContext that wraps the app. This context should toggle a class on the outer div ('theme-kids' vs 'theme-teens').
TAILWIND CONFIG: Extend the tailwind.config.js to support 'data-theme=kids' and 'data-theme=teens' selectors for colors.
SPLASH SCREEN: Create a 'Splash' component that is the first thing users see. It should have the 'No Cap News' logo animating in.
AGE SELECTOR: This is the onboarding step. It must be visually striking. 4 distinct cards.
NAVIGATION: Use a fixed bottom navigation bar for mobile. Icons: Home, Search, Profile.
CATEGORY TABS: Use a horizontal scrollable list of pills/badges.
ARTICLE CARD: Image top (aspect-video), Title middle, Meta bottom. For teens, add 'Share' and 'Save' icon buttons.
TEST IDS: Add data-testid='...' to every interactive element.
UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic, 'on distribution' outputs. In frontend design, this creates what users call the 'AI slop' aesthetic. Avoid this: make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as gradients
Don't make generic centered layouts, simplistic gradients, and uniform styling.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur)
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: 'transition: all'. This results in breaking transforms. Always add transitions for specific interactive elements like button, input excluding transforms
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add '.App { text-align: center; }' in the css file. This disrupts the human natural reading flow of text
Always use modern button styles like pill-shaped, or sharp button with interaction animations & color relevant to the app style
NEVER: use AI assistant Emoji characters like 🤖🧠💭💡🔮 for icons.
Every interaction needs micro-animations - hover states, transitions, parallax effects, and entrance animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable. Cramped designs look cheap.
Subtle grain textures, noise overlays, custom cursors, selection states, and loading animations: separates good from extraordinary.
Main agent relies on these image URLs. Missing categories (especially sponsor logos) = main agent will use placeholder text which is FORBIDDEN
Prioritize using pre-existing components from src/components/ui when applicable
Create new components that match the style and conventions of existing components when needed
Components MUST use named exports (export const ComponentName = ...)
Pages MUST use default exports (export default function PageName() {...})
Use 'sonner' for toasts. Sonner component are located in '/app/src/components/ui/sonner.tsx'
